article.body_preview:
Dhaka, Jan. 26 -- The government has increased sugar price again, by Tk 5 per kg, which will be effective from February 1, 2023.

As per discussion with the commerce ministry, a circular has been issued today by the executive secretary of Bangladesh Sugar Refiners Association.

After the price hike, the maximum retail price of unpackaged sugar will be Tk 107 while the price of packaged sugar will be Tk 112.

"Taking into account the price increase in the international market and the exchange rat

llm_connections.evidence_quote: the exchange rate of the US dollar and the production cost going up, the price of unpackaged sugar per kg has been set at Tk 107
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article explicitly cites the US dollar exchange rate as a reason for setting higher domestic sugar retail prices, matching the feature's focus on exchange-rate-driven cost effects.
